subject: Kirlia — a slender white and green Pokémon with a ballet-like stance, two red horn-like protrusions on its head, and a skirt-like lower body
description: A slim, elegant creature with a predominantly white body, green leg coverings, and two curved red protrusions on its head stands in a graceful, slightly tilted pose suggesting dance or psychic motion. The creature's eyes are closed or barely visible. The background shows soft pink tones and what appears to be rocky or floral terrain, giving a lush garden or natural setting. A sense of lightness and psychic energy permeates the composition — the figure appears to float slightly above the ground.
foreground: Slender white and green creature in a graceful dancing pose
background: Soft pink and natural tones, rocky or floral terrain
